meta.description: KempnerForge codebase map — files, classes, functions, tests, and registry entries
meta.note: Keep in sync as phases are implemented. Latest landings: VLM (Joint-Decoder, Cross-Attention, Mixture-of-Transformers) + freeze schedule + vision encoder registry + checkpoint helpers (peek_saved_step, flush_pending_save, cross-arch freeze-meta intersection) + FSDP2 helpers (_fsdp_wrap_transformer_blocks, _apply_fsdp_vlm, _build_vlm).

Registry.purpose: Central registry for named components (models, optimizers, schedulers, losses, vision encoders, VLM configs, modality strategies)

kempnerforge/config/schema.py.purpose: Backward-compatible re-exports — all config classes defined in submodules below

ModelConfig.purpose: Architecture hyperparameters (dim, layers, heads, vocab, MoE, QK-norm)

TrainConfig.purpose: Training hyperparameters (steps, batch, seq_len, precision, loss, grad accum)

OptimizerConfig.purpose: Optimizer settings (name, lr, betas, weight_decay, muon params, schedule_free_warmup_steps)

SchedulerConfig.purpose: LR schedule (type, warmup, min_lr_ratio, WSD params, wsd_decay_type, rex_alpha)

DatasetSource.purpose: Single data source in a multi-dataset mixture (path or HF, weight, name)

TrainingPhase.purpose: Step-triggered phase with dataset weight overrides and LR scaling for data annealing

DataConfig.purpose: Data pipeline (dataset_path, HF dataset, tokenizer, packing, mixing, phases, annealing)

DistributedConfig.purpose: Parallelism dimensions (tp, pp, cp, ep, dp_replicate, dp_shard, fsdp)

JobConfig.purpose: Top-level config aggregating all sub-configs, cross-section validation

kempnerforge/config/vlm.py.purpose: VLM (vision-language model) configuration. Discriminated union over `arch`: joint_decoder | cross_attention | mot. Each subclass registered via @registry.register_vlm_config

FreezeSpec.purpose: Single freeze directive (module alias or fnmatch pattern, frozen flag). Consumed by training/freeze.py

FreezeStage.purpose: Step-boundary freeze transition (start_step + tuple of FreezeSpecs). Strictly monotonic in start_step

VLMConfig.purpose: Base VLM configuration. Subclasses register via @registry.register_vlm_config and override the `arch` field's default

JointDecoderConfig(VLMConfig).purpose: Joint-Decoder: image embeds prepended to text via prefix_embeds + output_slice. arch='joint_decoder'

CrossAttentionConfig(VLMConfig).purpose: Cross-Attention (Llama-3-V style): image K/V flows into separate CrossAttentionBlocks at a configurable cadence. arch='cross_attention'

MoTConfig(VLMConfig).purpose: Mixture-of-Transformers (Liang et al. 2024 Algorithm 1): per-modality Q/K/V/O + per-modality FFN at every layer with single global SDPA. arch='mot'

TransformerBlock.purpose: Single pre-norm transformer block (attention + MLP with residuals). Used on text-only / Joint-Decoder / Cross-Attention paths

Transformer.purpose: Full decoder-only transformer (embed -> blocks -> norm -> head). Branches on isinstance(config.vlm, MoTConfig) to build MoTBlocks + per-modality mot_norms + per-modality forward path; on isinstance(config.vlm, CrossAttentionConfig) to interleave CrossAttentionBlocks at cadence; otherwise the JD / text-only path. Forward accepts a `modality: ModalityContext` kwarg with cross-arg invariants vs kv_caches

ModalityContext.purpose: Frozen dataclass bundling all modality-injection inputs flowing into Transformer.forward (inputs_embeds, prefix_embeds, output_slice, image_features, image_mask, modality_ids). Intra-context invariants enforced in __post_init__; cross-arg invariants vs kv_caches enforced at the top of Transformer.forward

CrossAttention.purpose: Cross-attention operator: text Q attends to image K/V. GQA + RoPE-free (image positions are not autoregressive)

CrossAttentionBlock.purpose: Pre-norm CA block: norm -> CrossAttention -> residual, norm -> MLP -> residual. Zero-init residual projections (o_proj + down_proj) so the block is identity at construction (warm-start property)

MoTAttention.purpose: Per-modality Q/K/V/O projections (nn.ModuleDict keyed by modality) with one global SDPA over the modality-concatenated sequence. Algorithm 1 of Liang et al. (2024). Per-modality QK-norm + per-modality RoPE; image-then-text concat layout matches Chameleon-style causal masking. o_proj.{m}.weight zero-init at construction.

MoTBlock.purpose: Pre-norm block: per-modality attn_norm + MoTAttention + per-modality mlp_norm + per-modality FFN. Dense FFN branches' down_proj zero-init for warm-start identity. MoE FFN branches (when (i+1) % moe_frequency == 0) skip zero-init

VisionEncoder.purpose: Base class for vision encoders. Subclasses provide `forward(pixel_values) -> features` of shape (B, num_tokens, feature_dim)

RandomVisionEncoder(VisionEncoder).purpose: Test-stub vision encoder: deterministic random features by image_id hash. No download; used for VLM smokes

_HFVisionEncoder(VisionEncoder).purpose: Wraps a HuggingFace vision model (SigLIP2 or CLIP). Optionally strips the [CLS] token. Stays in HF's loaded dtype; the adapter casts at the boundary

Adapter.purpose: 2-layer MLP from vision-feature dim to LLM embedding dim. reset_parameters() supports meta-device materialization

ModalityStrategy (Protocol).purpose: Composes raw VLM inputs into a ModalityContext. Stateless (holds no parameters); read submodules off the VLMWrapper. NOT registered as a submodule, so FSDP2 does not wrap them and DCP does not serialize them

JointDecoderStrategy.purpose: Joint-Decoder: image embeds prepended to text. Fills prefix_embeds + output_slice

CrossAttentionStrategy.purpose: Cross-Attention: image embeds flow as K/V into separate CA blocks. Fills image_features + image_mask

MoTStrategy.purpose: Mixture-of-Transformers: prefix_embeds + output_slice + per-position modality_ids (0=image, 1=text). Same residual-stream layout as JD, plus the routing tag the MoTBlock stack consumes

VLMWrapper(nn.Module).purpose: VLM wrapper composing vision_encoder + adapter + transformer + strategy. Strategy is a plain Python object, not an nn.Module submodule

KVCache.purpose: Pre-allocated KV cache for autoregressive generation

Attention.purpose: Grouped-Query Attention with RoPE, SDPA, optional QK-norm, doc_ids masking, attention weight capture

StandardMLP.purpose: Standard two-layer MLP with configurable activation

kempnerforge/model/init.py.purpose: Standard initialization: Linear+Embedding ~ N(0, init_std); residual o_proj/down_proj scaled by 1/sqrt(2*n_layers); cross-attention block o_proj/down_proj zero-init; MoT per-modality o_proj.{m}.weight + mlp.{m}.down_proj.weight zero-init via a second isinstance pass (MoTAttention / MoTBlock)

MoEMLP.purpose: Mixture-of-Experts feed-forward layer with router dispatch

functions: build_moe(dim, hidden_dim, num_experts, top_k, activation, router_type, shared_experts, capacity_factor, gradient_scale, sequence_aux_loss_weight, bias_schedule, packed_experts) -> MoEMLP
grouped_expert_forward_packed(x_sorted, tokens_per_expert, up_w, down_w, gate_w, activation) -> Tensor

SoftmaxTopKRouter.purpose: Mixtral-style softmax top-k router with aux load-balancing loss

SigmoidTopKRouter.purpose: DeepSeek-V3 style sigmoid router with learnable bias, adaptive scheduling, sequence aux loss

functions: generate(model, prompt_tokens, max_new_tokens, *, temperature, top_k, top_p, eos_token_id) -> Tensor

ActivationStore.purpose: Forward hook manager for capturing intermediate activations to CPU

functions: extract_representations(model, dataset, layers, device, batch_size, max_samples) -> dict[str, Tensor]

Lion.purpose: Sign-based momentum optimizer (Chen et al. 2023), half optimizer memory of AdamW

ScheduleFreeAdamW.purpose: Schedule-Free AdamW (Defazio & Mishchenko 2024), eliminates LR schedule via iterate averaging

functions: run_eval(model, eval_dataloader, loss_fn, device, eval_steps, *, pp_schedule, pp_rank, pp_size, pp_group) -> dict

kempnerforge/training/freeze.py.purpose: Freeze utilities: resolve module aliases / fnmatch patterns to parameter names, flip requires_grad, build canonical metadata for checkpoint validation, compute effective freeze at a given step from base specs + a freeze_schedule with start_step boundaries

StepContext.purpose: Per-step context dataclass passed to hooks (step, loss, grad_norm, lr, tokens_seen, model, optimizer)

TrainingHook.purpose: Base class for training loop hooks — override only the methods you need

HookRunner.purpose: Dispatches hook calls to registered hooks, zero cost when empty

HuggingFaceDataset.purpose: HuggingFace dataset with tokenization and sequence packing

StreamingHuggingFaceDataset.purpose: Streaming HuggingFace IterableDataset for large corpora

MixtureDataset.purpose: Concatenates multiple datasets with global indexing and per-sample dataset_idx

StatefulDataLoader.purpose: DataLoader wrapper with checkpoint/resume state tracking

DistributedSampler.purpose: Deterministic distributed sampler with skip-ahead for resumption

MixtureSampler.purpose: Weighted sampler over MixtureDataset with temperature scaling and oversampling

HuggingFaceVLMDataset.purpose: Map-style VLM dataset over a HuggingFace Dataset (Hub id or local save_to_disk path). Tokenizes captions, normalizes images, returns (pixel_values, input_ids, labels) per sample

VLMCollator.purpose: Fixed-length pad collator for VLM batches. Pads input_ids and labels to max_text_len so NCCL collectives stay rank-consistent under FSDP2

functions: build_parallel_model(model_config, device, device_mesh, *, ac_mode, mp_policy, param_dtype, compile_model, fp8) -> nn.Module (dispatches to _build_vlm when model_config.vlm is set)
_build_vlm(model_config, device, device_mesh, *, ac_mode, mp_policy, param_dtype, compile_model, fp8) -> VLMWrapper
apply_fsdp2(model, device_mesh, mp_policy, reshard_after_forward) (text-only path; shares _fsdp_wrap_transformer_blocks with VLM)
_apply_fsdp_vlm(wrapper, device_mesh, mp_policy, reshard_after_forward) (VLM-aware FSDP: inner Transformer per-block + adapter + optional encoder wrap based on freeze)
_fsdp_wrap_transformer_blocks(transformer, dp_mesh, policy, reshard_after_forward) (EP-MoE-aware per-block FSDP wrap; iterates transformer.layers and transformer.cross_attention_layers)

_AllToAll.purpose: Differentiable all-to-all autograd function for expert dispatch

functions: ep_dispatch_and_compute(x, weights, indices, moe, ep_group, local_expert_start, num_local_experts, ep_world_size, gradient_scale) -> Tensor

PipelineStageModule.purpose: Model chunk for a single pipeline stage

functions: build_pipeline_stage(stage_module, device_mesh, device, batch_size, seq_len, param_dtype) -> PipelineStage
build_train_state(step, tokens_seen, scheduler, dataloader, extra) -> dict

CheckpointManager.purpose: DCP-based distributed checkpoint save/load/cleanup manager. Cross-arch VLM freeze-metadata validation, rank-0-authoritative train_state existence broadcast (NFS/Lustre stat() race), ownership-gated train_state.pt load

MetricsTracker.purpose: Collect, smooth (EMA), and dispatch metrics to backends

DeviceMemoryMonitor.purpose: Track GPU memory across training steps with snapshot export

CUDATimer.purpose: CUDA event-based timer for GPU timing

NaNDetector.purpose: Detect and track NaN/Inf in loss and gradients with configurable actions

scripts/train.py.purpose: Main training entry point — config, distributed setup, training loop, checkpointing

scripts/eval.py.purpose: Standalone evaluation — load model + checkpoint, compute loss/perplexity

scripts/generate.py.purpose: Text generation — load model, sample from prompts, interactive REPL

scripts/eval_harness.py.purpose: Run lm-eval-harness benchmarks on KempnerForge checkpoints (converts DCP to HF format)

scripts/check_env.py.purpose: Centralized preflight: tag-driven environment checks (uv, repo layout, gpu, slurm, multi-node, wandb, hf, gh) and the cluster-config writer (`--init`)

scripts/prep_vlm_coco_smoke.py.purpose: Build a small COCO Karpathy HuggingFace Dataset on disk for VLM smoke runs by joining the testbed Karpathy JSON with the testbed COCO image tree

tests/unit/test_dataset_mmap_cleanup.py.note: Module-level pytest functions (no Test* classes): mmap close on partial-open failure, idempotent close, mmap retention on success, .bin variant

tests/unit/test_distributed_seed.py.note: Module-level pytest functions: _set_seed seeds python/numpy/torch.cpu/torch.cuda; varies with pp_rank; consistent across dp ranks; covers checkpoint surface

tests/distributed/test_optimizer_distrib.note: Lion, Schedule-Free AdamW, optimizer-scheduler compat under FSDP2

tests/distributed/test_vlm_cross_attn_fs.note: VLM Cross-Attention FSDP2 (mandatory merge gate for CA)

tests/distributed/test_vlm_mot_fsdp.py.note: VLM Mixture-of-Transformers FSDP2 (mandatory merge gate for MoT)

tests/e2e/test_training_e2e.py.note: Full training runs: single GPU, FSDP, TP, PP, MoE, FP8, checkpoint resume, signal handling

tests/smoke/test_smoke.py.note: Hardware-adaptive smoke tests: CPU, single GPU, multi-GPU (torchrun or srun)
